annotations.title: Face to Face Spa at Cinco Ranch

content.text:
Dermaplaning is a non-invasive exfoliation treatment that removes dead skin cells and fine facial hair, resulting in smoother, more radiant skin. In Katy, Texas, several reputable establishments offer dermaplaning services:

**[Restore Hyper Wellness](https://www.restore.com/locations/tx-katy-tx014?utm_medium=Yext&y_source=1_MzE2Mjk5MzUtNzE1LWxvY2F0aW9uLndlYnNpdGU%3D&utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 4.9 (281 reviews)**  
_23116 Cinco Ranch Blvd, Katy, TX 77494_  
Offers DERMAFLASH LUXE+ Sonic Dermaplaning to remove peach fuzz and dead skin cells, revealing smoother, glowing skin. Located at 23116 Cinco Ranch Boulevard.

**[Clear Dermatology](https://cleardermatology.com/?utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=gbp-listing&utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Dermatologist · 4.8 (1598 reviews)**  
_17756 Katy Fwy g1, Houston, TX 77094_  
Provides dermaplaning treatments to exfoliate the top layer of dead skin cells and fine hair, enhancing skin texture and tone. Located at 17756 Katy Freeway, Suite G-1.

**[4Ever Glow Salon & MedSpa](https://4everglowmedspa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 4.9 (110 reviews)**  
_722 Katy Fort Bend Rd #500, Katy, TX 77494_  
Specializes in esthetician services including dermaplaning, facials, and laser hair removal. Located at 24646 Kingsland Blvd.

**[Face to Face Spa at Cinco Ranch](https://facetofacespa.com/cinco-ranch/?utm_medium=organic&utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 4.9 (353 reviews)**  
_27131 Cinco Ranch Blvd Suite 750, Katy, TX 77494_  
Offers professional dermaplaning to improve skin texture and luster, providing a brighter complexion with no downtime. Located in Cinco Ranch.

**[Allay Med Spa](http://allaymedspa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 4.9 (36 reviews)**  
_24510 Kingsland Blvd, Katy, TX 77494_  
Provides dermaplaning to remove dead skin cells and hair, aiming for smooth, radiant, and youthful skin. Located at 24510 Kingsland Blvd.

**[Luminous MediSpa](http://www.luminousmedispa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 5.0 (134 reviews)**  
_410 W Grand Pkwy S #310, Katy, TX 77494_  
Offers dermaplaning to exfoliate dead skin cells and fine facial hair, enhancing skincare product absorption. Located at 410 W Grand Pkwy S, Suite 310.

Before scheduling a dermaplaning session, it's advisable to consult with the provider to ensure the treatment aligns with your skin type and goals.
